meaning: n.恶魔,亚玻伦(<<圣经>>中的人物,无底坑的使者)
examples: 'What fun it was, especially going by the lions, fighting Apollyon, and passing through the valley where the hob-goblins were, ' said Jo.
She had not half the fascination of that solitary, intrepid figure who faced all alone the shadows of the Dark Valley and the encounter with Apollyon .
And they had a king over them, which is the angel of the bottomless pit, whose name in the Hebrew tongue is Abaddon, but in the Greek tongue hath his name Apollyon.
